findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 PDF contains an embedded .docx attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB).

proposed_artifacts.content: The PDF NAP-SRC-0046 includes an embedded .docx file named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB). The extraction tool (pdftotext) did not extract the binary attachment; only the email text was captured. To recover the .docx, use a tool that extracts embedded OLE objects from PDFs (e.g., pdfdetach, Apache Tika, or manual extraction via a PDF editor). The extracted .docx should be saved as a candidate artifact for further review.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extracted RA Application Pack .docx from NAP-SRC-0046

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use pdfdetach or Apache Tika to extract the embedded .docx attachment '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from source NAP-SRC-0046. Save the extracted file to candidate/T-B07-003/2026-27_RA_Application_Pack.docx and verify its integrity (e.g., check file signature and size).
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx from NAP-SRC-0046 using pdfdetach or Tika

summary: NAP-SRC-0046 PDF contains an embedded .docx attachment ('2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx', 63 KB). The pdftotext extraction captured only the email body; the binary attachment was not extracted. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the .docx using pdfdetach or Apache Tika.

uncertainties.description: The .docx attachment content is unknown; it may contain application forms, terms, or other relevant information.
